title: Unbreakable Blocks +
description: Unbreakable blocks equivalent of vanilla and modded Minecraft's blocks
body:
**What is it ?**

Introducing the "Unbreakable Blocks +" mod for Minecraft! This mod not only expands the range of indestructible blocks beyond vanilla Minecraft, but it also incorporates unbreakable versions of blocks from various popular mods, providing a diverse and fortified selection for your builds. With "Unbreakable Blocks +," you can create resilient structures, set secure boundaries, and design immersive environments with blocks from both Minecraft and your favorite mods.

Ideal for roleplay scenarios, challenge maps, or secure server setups, this mod empowers admins to build enduring worlds that withstand any damage. By integrating blocks from vanilla and other mods, "Unbreakable Blocks +" ensures unparalleled world-building potential, allowing for indestructible, customized creations that stay intact across play sessions and server events.


**Mods integration :**

1. [Cuffed](https://modrinth.com/mod/cuffed)

To ensure the proper functionality of certain blocks, it is necessary to download the original mod from which the block was copied. Additionally, place the block in question 2 blocks below the Unbreakable Blocks+ block, as is the case with the Cuffed safe. Otherwise, the block will be purely cosmetic and will not have any functionality.


**Blocks list :**
  <details>
  <summary>Built in</summary>
  Invisible pressure plate
  | Police Department sign 3x1
  | Fire Department sign 3x1
  | Hospital Emergency sign 3x1
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Other mods integration</summary>
    <details>
    <summary>Cuffed</summary>
    Reinforced bars bottom
    | Reinforced bars middle
    | Reinforced bars top
    | Reinforced bars gapped
    | Cell door
    | Cell door (open only with redstone like a normal iron door)
    | Reinforced smooth stone
    | Reinforced stone
    | Reinforced stone slab
    | Reinforced stone stairs
    | Chiseld reinforced stone
    | Reinforced Lamp
    | Safe (closed) (download original Cuffed mod et place the original safe 2 blocks under to make the unbreakable version work)
    </details>
  </details>
